zh.lifeSummary: 當Johne Wilsone於1540年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波時，他的父親Patrick Wilsone25歲，母親Katharine Majorbankis24歲。他於1566年7月13日與Helen Purdey or Purddy在英國蘇格蘭艾丁波卡農蓋特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Wilsone
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will + patronymic -son ‘son of Will’. Will was a very common medieval short form of William . This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Will
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Will, a short form of William . This surname is now commonly found in Scotland, in Aberdeenshire, Angus, and Kincardineshire.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring or stream, from Middle English wel, wel(l)e, wille, in a southwestern dialect form. This surname is found predominantly in the south and southwestern parts of the country. Compare Well 1.
English: nickname from Middle English iwil, wil(l)e ‘agreeable, pleasing’.

nameMeanings.name: Johne
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: When Johne Wilsone was born in 1540, in Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Patrick Wilsone, was 25 and his mother, Katharine Majorbankis, was 24. He married Helen Purdey or Purddy on 13 July 1566, in Canongate, Edinburgh, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johne Wilsone est né en 1540, à Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Patrick Wilsone, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Katharine Majorbankis, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Helen Purdey or Purddy le 13 juillet 1566, à Canongate, Edinburgh, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johne Wilsone 1540 in Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Patrick Wilsone 25 und seine Mutter Katharine Majorbankis 24. Er hat am 13. Juli 1566 in Canongate, Edinburgh, Schottland, United Kingdom Helen Purdey or Purddy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johne Wilsone è nato il nel 1540 nel Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Patrick Wilsone, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Katharine Majorbankis, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Helen Purdey or Purddy il 13 luglio 1566, nel Canongate, Edinburgh, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Johne Wilsoneが1540年にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグで生まれた時，父Patrick Wilsoneは25歳，母Katharine Majorbankisは24歳であった。1566年7月13日にイギリススコットランドエディンブルグカノンガトでHelen Purdey or Purddyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Johne Wilsone(이)가 1540년 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Patrick Wilsone(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Katharine Majorbankis(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1566년 7월 13일 영국 스코틀랜드 에딘버그h 캔옹가트에서 Helen Purdey or Purddy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johne Wilsone nasceu em 1540, em Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Patrick Wilsone, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Katharine Majorbankis, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Helen Purdey or Purddy em 13 de julho de 1566, em Canongate, Edinburgh, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johne Wilsone родился в 1540 г. в местности эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Patrick Wilsone было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Katharine Majorbankis, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Helen Purdey or Purddy 13 июля 1566 г. в местности канонгэит, эдинбург, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери.
